name: Ghost Meets Girl - A Shiranui's Story
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>逢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>麗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>譚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>不知火</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しらぬい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>語</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がたり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: The Tale of the Meeting with the Splendid Spectral Grace - A Shiranui Story
desc: If your opponent controls a monster: Discard 1 Zombie monster; Special Summon 1 "Shiranui" monster with a different name from your Deck or GY, also you cannot Special Summon monsters, except Zombie monsters, for the rest of this turn after this card resolves. You can only activate 1 "Ghost Meets Girl - A Shiranui's Story" per turn.
eff: If your opponent controls a monster: Discard 1 Zombie monster; Special Summon 1 "Shiranui" monster with a different name from your Deck or GY, also you cannot Special Summon monsters, except Zombie monsters, for the rest of this turn after this card resolves. You can only activate 1 "Ghost Meets Girl - A Shiranui's Story" per turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
